title: Add Azure CI/CD workflow for build, test, and deployment
description: Create an Azure-focused CI/CD workflow so images can be built, pushed to ACR, and deployed to AKS without manual steps.
acceptanceCriteria: A workflow exists for build and test
Docker images are pushed to the Azure container registry
The workflow supports deployment to the Azure target environment
notes: The researcher notes that no CI/CD pipeline currently exists for Azure.
The implementation should be documented so the same pattern can later be applied to AWS.
